---
title: "lightning_rod.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\new_world_seed\.agents\scripts\lightning_rod.py"
loc: 50
complexity: 6
logic_score: 3.27
style_score: 3.83
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.43
---

## Intent
The `lightning_rod.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on SovereignHUD, box_top, box_row, box_bottom, optimize_file. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignHUD, box_top, box_row, box_bottom, optimize_file. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [sv_engine](file://sv_engine)

### Exports
- `SovereignHUD`
- `box_top`
- `box_row`
- `box_bottom`
- `optimize_file`
